title: U.K. confirms Iran fired two missiles at British-American base in Indian Ocean which failed to reach their target
summary_full: Iran fired the two missiles at the joint U.S.-U.K. Diego Garcia base in the Indian Ocean but they failed to reach their target, U.K. minister says.
summary_public: Iran fired the two missiles at the joint U.S.-U.K. Diego Garcia base in the Indian Ocean but they failed to reach their target, U.K. minister says.

GB.label: negative
GB.evidence: fired two missiles at British-American base
